backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, blog posts, contact submissions, lead magnet downloads, orders, advisory applications, Stripe integration, and authorization with access control and rate limiting for failed login attempts.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that currently performs no-op migration by returning the old actor state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: Google Analytics tracking code installation, Google Search Console verification meta tag, and documentation for granting analytics/console access to project owner.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend files including App.tsx with Google Analytics integration, pages for home/products/blog/contact, and components with AIShield India branding and "Security Systems for Modern Startups" tagline.
frontend/ANALYTICS_SETUP.md: Step-by-step documentation for setting up Google Analytics and Google Search Console, including property creation, verification code installation, granting dashboard access to project owner, and troubleshooting guidance.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components including background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Google Analytics (G-XXXXXXXXXX placeholder) and Google Search Console verification meta tag (placeholder), includes consent mode for DPDP Act 2023 compliance and Content Security Policy headers allowing analytics domains.
frontend/public/_headers: HTTP security headers configuration file defining Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy for all routes.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application entry point that configures TanStack Router with lazy-loaded page components, sets up React Query client, and defines all application routes including home, blog, products, legal pages, and payment flows.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminNav.t: Fixed sidebar navigation for admin panel with links to dashboard, content, pricing, testimonials, and credentials sections, plus a logout button.
frontend/src/components/admin/StatCard.t: Reusable card component for displaying statistics with title, numeric value, icon, and loading skeleton state support.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying company information, product/service links, legal links, social media (LinkedIn), and a CTA section with email contact and entity details for AIShield India.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header component with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menu, and CTA button for booking strategy calls, featuring responsive design with hamburger menu for mobile.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with Header and Footer, using TanStack Router's Outlet for page content rendering.
frontend/src/components/SecurityHeadersV: Development-only component that validates presence of security headers (CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy) via meta tags and displays warnings or success alerts in the bottom-right corner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Hook that combines Internet Identity authentication with backend actor to check if the current user has admin privileges, returning authentication and admin status with loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching blog posts, submitting contact/advisory forms, recording lead downloads, and creating Stripe checkout sessions via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for a navy/emerald color scheme, including light/dark mode variables and utility classes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component showcasing AIShield India's mission, expertise in SOC operations, and focus on practical cybersecurity solutions for Indian startups.
Admin dashboard displaying statistics and recent entries for advisory applications, contact submissions, and lead downloads using React Query to fetch data from the backend actor.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLayout.tsx: Protected admin layout component that handles Internet Identity authentication, admin authorization checks, and renders AdminNav with nested routes or login/access-denied screens.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContentManageme: Admin page for managing Security Advisory page content including capacity messages, cost comparisons, and service descriptions with input validation and sanitization.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CredentialsMana: Admin page for managing professional credentials (SOC 2, ISO 27001) and expertise items with validation, sanitization, and save functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PricingManageme: Admin page for managing pricing for advisory services and toolkit products with numeric validation and currency formatting.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestimonialsMan: Admin page for CRUD operations on testimonials with dialog-based forms, validation, sanitization, and delete confirmation.
Confirmation page displayed after advisory application submission, explaining next steps and providing links to free resources while users await approval.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays blog posts with featured images, author info, publish dates, and tags, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Displays a single blog post with featured image, author, date, tags, and HTML content. Fetches post data by ID from route params and handles loading/not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact form page with validation for name, email, company, and message fields using input sanitization utilities. Shows success card after submission and displays contact information cards.
frontend/src/pages/FreeChecklist.tsx: Lead capture page offering a free AI Risk Self-Assessment Checklist for Indian startups. Collects email, records lead download, and shows success confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero section, problem statement about AI security risks for Indian startups, and cards showcasing products (Security Toolkit and Advisory Services). Includes CTAs for strategy calls and free checklist download.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment failure page displaying error message with troubleshooting steps and action buttons to retry payment or contact support.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success confirmation page showing order confirmation, download access instructions, next steps, and support contact information with links back to home or support.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Static page component displaying AIShield India's privacy policy with sections on data collection, usage, DPDP Act 2023 compliance, and user rights for a sole proprietorship business.
frontend/src/pages/products/SecurityTool: Product landing page for Security Toolkit with hero section, product previews, tiered pricing (Basic/Pro/Pro+), and Stripe checkout integration.
React component rendering a marketing page comparing Security Advisory vs Security Toolkit products, featuring hero section, pricing comparison cards, and feature lists with icons.
Product page for SOC Analyst Playbook with pricing display and Stripe checkout integration for purchasing the digital download.
Empty React component file for Virtual CISO product page (no content implemented).
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Static page component outlining refund policies: no refunds for digital products, pro-rata refunds for advisory services before completion, and instructions for requesting refunds.
frontend/src/pages/SecurityAdvisory.tsx: Form page for submitting security advisory applications with validation, sanitization, and fields for company details, security setup, and consent; submits via useSubmitAdvisoryApplication hook.
frontend/src/pages/TermsConditions.tsx: Static page component presenting terms and conditions including service descriptions, advisory disclaimers, intellectual property rights, and liability limitations for AIShield India.
frontend/src/utils/inputSanitization.ts: Utility functions for input validation and sanitization including HTML/text sanitization, email/URL/numeric validation, text length checks, and form data sanitization.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing utilities supporting both hash-based and query string routing, with sessionStorage persistence and parameter cleanup functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme (navy, emerald), OKLCH color system, typography plugin, container queries, animations, and custom shadows.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting AIShield India application with Google Analytics and Search Console integration features, architectural notes, and pending feature requests.
